ab: Kiadredreelaku musuane luiya ki miauaubu ku amadradreelaneta.
ch: W:我和您約明天下午好嗎?
en: Can I make an appointment with you tomorrow afternoon?

ab: Mathariri ikayta inu madradresenge?
ch: M:可以，我們約哪裡見面?
en: Sure, where should we meet?

ab: Mathariri ikayta gaku? lritusasinginay.
ch: W:我們約學校好嗎?我們要錄影。
en: How about meeting at school? We need to shoot a video.

ab: Tamua siwkaiziw kamani midra, lringiragelanaku ku Ngudradrekadhane.
ch: M:那去聚會所好了，我會穿族服去。
en: Then let’s go to the community center. I’ll wear folk costume.

ab: Ngiaesadhane ku sakera ki cekelenay. lukakalapuupuanenga kela silape nakuane.
ch: W: 我們部落的櫻花盛開很漂亮。等花開的時候你來找我吧!
en: The cherry blossoms in our tribe are beautiful when they bloom. Come find me when the flowers bloom!

ab: Pakelana ki kalarigarigane, ngiabalaynga turamuru
ch: M: 那要等到春天，太晚了吧!
en: That would have to wait until spring. It’s too late, isn’t it?

ab: Ani kelanga ki tangidrakakalane
ch: W: 那你豐年祭的時候來吧!
en: Then come during our Harvest Festival!

ab: Alakuini, siadramaku turamuru!
ch: M: 好啊!我很期待!
en: Alright! I’m looking forward to it!

ab: Asu kirimu nawsiwlri mubalriw cekecekele iya?
ch: W: 請問你為甚麼要搬回部落生活?
en: May I ask why you decided to move back to the tribe?

ab: Lrimubalrivaku bulrubulru.
ch: M: 我要回去教書。
en: I want to return to teach at the local school.

ab: Asu kaiikay drataane bulrubulru?
ch: W: 為甚麼不在都市教書?
en: Why not teach in the city?

ab: Mavalringivaku ki cekeleli, sidrama ku adulruanli pangibilri ki cekeleli.
ch: M: 因為我懷念我的故鄉，也希望能回饋部落。
en: Because I miss my hometown and I also want to give back to the tribe.

ab: Malrigili su tinunu, aneane ku wabulru musuane?
ch: M:你很會織布，是誰教你的?
en: You’re very skilled at weaving, who taught you?

ab: Kaingu, amani ku malrilrigilinga ikay ki cekelenay ka taratinunu.
ch: W:是我的奶奶，她是我們部落最會織布的人。
en: It was my grandmother, she is the most skilled weaver in our tribe.

ab: Asu nau kiburlu ki tatinutinunane iya?
ch: M:你怎麼會想要學織布?
en: How did you develop an interest in learning weaving?

ab: Bungukanay kikay watinunu, nau paucungulu kay bunguka amiaku.
ch: W:織布是我們的文化，我想要讓文化延續。
en: Weaving is a part of our culture, and I want to ensure its continuity.

ab: Kikay kabavane ala mathariri luungulane.
ch: M:這個小米酒真好喝。
en: This millet wine is delicious.

ab: Amaniaku ka tuabava.
ch: W:是我自己釀的喔!
en: I made it myself!

ab: Malrigili su turamuru, kikay lripakaulay madu?
ch: M:你真厲害，這要釀很久嗎?
en: You’re really talented. Does it take a long time to make?

ab: Mathariri ku pataratulru ki dramare pakaangu lasangulreeme.
ch: 可以放三個月之久使它發酵醇香。
en: It can be left to ferment for up to three months.
